title: Leveraged Loan CLOs
description: The CDO's respectable cousin is back, in a sharper suit and a new acronym. Slice up corporate loans, stamp them AAA, and try not to think about 2008.

title: Commercial Real Estate Boom
description: Values up 15% this quarter, cranes on every corner, money practically begging to be lent. Lending opportunities abound — but is it a bubble?

title: Fintech Charter Rental
description: A payments app with a unicorn valuation wants to borrow your boring banking license. They get the cool; you get the cut.

title: Crypto Custody Mandate
description: A sovereign fund wants you to babysit a mountain of Bitcoin. The fees are astronomical. So is the chance regulators change their minds by Tuesday.

title: SPAC Underwriting
description: A blank check. A celebrity sponsor. A pitch deck with no company in it yet. Raise a billion on a vibe. The vibe is fading — move fast.

title: AI Trading Edge
description: Spend big on machine-learning quants who promise a 3x edge. Either you front-run the whole market — or you fund a very expensive science project.

title: Private Credit Direct Lend
description: Skip the public markets, lend straight to mid-market firms at 12%. Banks are retreating; you walk in and name your price. Until defaults bite.

title: ESG Green Bond
description: Wrap a renewable-energy project in a green bow and sell it to funds with mandates to feel good. Modest yield, spotless conscience.

title: Meme-Stock Market Making
description: Retail traders on a forum have decided a dying retailer is worth billions. Provide liquidity into the chaos. Thrilling. Unhinged. Profitable — for a week.

title: Climate Resilience Fund
description: Finance seawalls, microgrids, and drought-proof farms. Slow money, long horizon — but when the tipping points hit, you're on the right side of the ledger.
